tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: THE OLYMPIC GAMES
tasks.text: The Olympic Games are the most important international sports competition, 1.1. _________ they have a very long history. The first Olympics were held in ancient Greece more 1.2. _________ 2,700 years ago. At that time, only men were allowed 1.3. _________ compete, and the games lasted just one day. The modern Olympic Games were started 1.4. _________ a French man called Pierre de Coubertin in 1896. Since then, the Games 1.5. _________ been held every four years, except during the two World Wars. Today, thousands of athletes from 1.6. _________ over the world take part in the Olympics. 1.7. _________ are two types of Olympic Games: the Summer Olympics and the Winter Olympics. 1.8. _________ of them takes place every four years, but they are held two years apart from 1.9. _________ other. Winning a gold medal at the Olympics is considered 1.10. _________ be the greatest achievement for any athlete.
